papers_mined.title: Click Consonant Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Khoisan languages use 4 basic clicks (|, ǁ, !, ǂ); Southern group adds 5th bilabial 'kiss click' (ʘ); maximum 5 click-type contrasts.

papers_mined.title: Khoisan Languages Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Phonemic inventory huge: !Xóõ 126 consonants 83 click distinctions; |Gui 90/52; Ju 105/55; Nama 20; Hadza 9. Largest consonant systems in world.

papers_mined.title: Taa Language Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: !Xóõ/Taa: 83 click distinctions, 5 places × multiple accompaniments; world record inventory.
